Sandbox_NinjaLineages_SharinganFirstTomo: Zombie kills required to awaken the Sharingan's first Tomoe.
Sandbox_NinjaLineages_SharinganSecondTom: Zombie kills required to awaken the Sharingan's second Tomoe. Values below the first threshold are raised to match it.
Sandbox_NinjaLineages_SharinganThirdTomo: Zombie kills required to awaken the Sharingan's third Tomoe. Values below the second threshold are raised to match it.
